x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Space inventory is the core dataset Now Assist WSD uses for AI space recommendations. Without sufficient space records, AI cannot suggest appropriate workspaces or analyze occupancy patterns.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_core_space"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total >= 100) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: total + " space records in inventory", finding: total + " spaces. Now Assist WSD has sufficient space data for AI-powered space recommendations and occupancy analysis." }; } else if (total >= 20) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: total + " space records in inventory", finding: "Only " + total + " spaces (target: 100+). Now Assist WSD AI space recommendations will have limited coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: total + " space records in inventory", finding: "Only " + total + " spaces. Insufficient space data for meaningful Now Assist WSD AI recommendations." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate the space inventory in Workplace Core. Import floor plans and space data to ensure Now Assist WSD has sufficient space records for AI-powered recommendations.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_9bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c60
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Space inventory is the core dataset Now Assist WSD uses for AI space recommendations. Without sufficient space records, AI cannot suggest appropriate workspaces or analyze occupancy patterns.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Space Inventory Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_core_space"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total >= 100) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: total + " space records in inventory", finding: total + " spaces. Now Assist WSD has sufficient space data for AI-powered space recommendations and occupancy analysis." }; } else if (total >= 20) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: total + " space records in inventory", finding: "Only " + total + " spaces (target: 100+). Now Assist WSD AI space recommendations will have limited coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: total + " space records in inventory", finding: "Only " + total + " spaces. Insufficient space data for meaningful Now Assist WSD AI recommendations." }; } })]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>WSD</module><number>CHK0000599</number><order>200</order><remediation_guidance>Populate the space inventory in Workplace Core. Import floor plans and space data to ensure Now Assist WSD has sufficient space records for AI-powered recommendations.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>9bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c60</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Space Inventory Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_9bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c60</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
